title: Mars completes $36 billion acquisition of Kellanova - Reuters
summary: Mars Inc has completed its acquisition of Kellanova for roughly $36 billion, broadening its snacking portfolio across global markets.

title: Mars closes acquisition of Kellanova in $36bn snacking megadeal - Bloomberg
summary: Confectionery giant Mars has closed its purchase of Kellanova, the maker of Pringles and Cheez-It, in a deal valued at about $36 billion.

title: Mars finalises Kellanova takeover worth $36 billion - FoodBev Media
summary: Mars has finalised its takeover of Kellanova, extending its reach in global snacking categories.

title: Ferrero acquires WK Kellogg in $3.1 billion cereal deal - Financial Times
summary: Italian confectioner Ferrero has agreed to acquire WK Kellogg, the North American cereal business, for about $3.1 billion.

title: Investindustrial to take TreeHouse Foods private in $2.9 billion deal - Reuters
summary: Private equity firm Investindustrial agreed to acquire packaged-food maker TreeHouse Foods in a $2.9 billion all-cash take-private transaction.

title: Molson Coors completes acquisition of Atomic Brands, maker of Monaco Cocktails - CNBC
summary: Molson Coors Beverage Company completed its acquisition of Atomic Brands, owner of Monaco Cocktails, expanding its ready-to-drink spirits portfolio.

title: Constellation Brands to acquire non-alcoholic brand HOPWTR - Beverage Daily
summary: Constellation Brands signed an agreement to acquire the remaining interest in HOPWTR, a non-alcoholic sparkling beverage brand, with closing expected in early April 2026.

title: Post Holdings announces sale of pasta business to Richardson - PR Newswire
summary: Post Holdings announced the sale of its pasta business to Richardson Holdings Limited, divesting a slower-growth packaged food unit.

title: CVC Capital Partners acquires cosmetics maker Mandom Corp for $651.5 million - Nikkei
summary: CVC Capital Partners completed its acquisition of Japanese cosmetics and fragrance manufacturer Mandom Corp in a deal worth $651.5 million.

title: Advent International acquires premium body care brand Salt & Stone - WWD
summary: Advent International acquired Salt & Stone, one of the fastest-growing brands in premium body care and personal care, in March 2026.

title: Hindustan Unilever acquires 90.5% stake in D2C skincare brand Minimalist - Economic Times
summary: Hindustan Unilever received CCI approval to acquire a 90.5% majority stake in direct-to-consumer skincare brand Minimalist for INR 2,670 crore.

title: HUL buys majority stake in Minimalist for Rs 2,670 crore - Livemint
summary: Hindustan Unilever has acquired a majority stake in skincare D2C brand Minimalist in a deal valued at Rs 2,670 crore.

title: ITC acquires Yoga Bar maker Sproutlife Foods, expands health snacks portfolio - Business Standard

title: Marico acquires majority stake in plant-based nutrition brand Plix - Moneycontrol

title: Emami raises stake in men's grooming brand The Man Company to 100% - Financial Express

title: Unilever weighs major separation of food assets in strategy shift - Reuters
summary: Unilever is in early stages of considering a full separation or divestiture of its food assets, a move that could be worth tens of billions of dollars.

title: Nestle advances water unit sale process, deconsolidation expected from 2027 - Bloomberg
summary: Nestle's water business sale process is underway as the company moves to divest the unit, with deconsolidation expected from 2027.

title: Reckitt to sell portfolio of homecare brands in $5 billion divestiture - Wall Street Journal

summary: PepsiCo announced the acquisition of a fast-growing prebiotic soda brand, expanding its functional and better-for-you beverage portfolio.

title: Dabur acquires majority stake in spices and foods company - Economic Times
summary: Dabur India acquired a majority stake in a packaged spices and foods company to strengthen its foods and FMCG portfolio.

summary: Coca-Cola made a strategic investment in a growing energy drink brand through a new funding round, strengthening its beverages lineup.

title: L'Oreal acquires majority stake in dermocosmetics brand - WWD

title: FMCG sector outlook: why rural demand is recovering in 2026 - Economic Times
summary: An analysis of how FMCG companies are seeing rural demand recovery in 2026, with no specific deal or transaction mentioned.
